title: Avoid using reflection to increase accessibility of classes, methods, or fields
description: Altering or bypassing the accessibility of classes, methods, or fields through reflection violates the encapsulation principle. This can break the internal contracts of the accessed target and lead to maintainability issues and runtime errors.
recommendation: Avoid using reflection to change the visibility of a class, method or field, and do not use reflection to directly update a field value.
impact: Violates encapsulation principle, leading to maintainability issues and runtime errors.

checks.message: Avoid using reflection to change the visibility of a class, method or field, and do not use reflection to directly update a field value.
